brand_identity.name: SuperNetworkAI
brand_identity.ethos: The Ethereal Nexus - Where Human Purpose Meets AI Precision

secondary_font.name: Manrope
secondary_font.usage: Body Text, UI Elements, Data Display

accent_font.name: JetBrains Mono
accent_font.usage: AI Match Explanations, Code Snippets, Data Tags

landing_page.hero_section: Centered content with 'Bento' grid of floating profile cards behind or around the main text.
landing_page.features_section: Zig-zag layout with large typography and glassmorphic illustrations.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar navigation (collapsible), Top bar for search/global actions, Main content area with widget grid.
dashboard.card_style: Flat surface with 1px border (#27272A) and subtle hover lift.

search_results.card_display: Rich profile cards with 'Match Explanation' highlighted. Use Masonry for varied content height if bios differ significantly, otherwise strict Grid.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-6 py-2 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.4)] transition-all hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(59,130,246,0.6)]
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-2
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-full px-6 py-2

inputs.search_bar: bg-surface/50 border-surface_highlight rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50 placeholder:text-muted-foreground backdrop-blur-md
inputs.form_field: bg-transparent border-b border-border focus:border-primary px-0 py-2 rounded-none transition-colors

cards.match_card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 p-6 backdrop-blur-md transition-all hover:border-primary/50 hover:bg-white/10
cards.profile_card: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm

visual_enhancers.match_highlight: font-mono text-sm text-green-400 bg-green-400/10 px-2 py-1 rounded-md border border-green-400/20
visual_enhancers.ai_explanation_box: mt-4 p-4 rounded-lg bg-black/40 border border-primary/20 font-mono text-sm text-gray-300 relative before:content-['AI_INSIGHT'] before:absolute before:-top-3 before:left-3 before:bg-background before:px-2 before:text-[10px] before:text-primary

animation_guidelines.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
animation_guidelines.stagger_children: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, show: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text-gray-400 is readable on dark bg. Use text-gray-300 if needed.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring required: ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2 ring-offset-background

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'framer-motion' for animations if not present.
Use the provided Google Fonts URLs in index.css.
Implement the 'Match Explanation' box exactly as described in 'visual_enhancers'.
For the Ikigai chart, use CSS overlapping circles or a simple SVG implementation.
Ensure the dashboard feels 'dense' but 'breathing' - use the high density grid rules.
Use the placeholder avatar API (DiceBear) for user profiles without images: `https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/avataaars/svg?seed=${username}`
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in `/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx`
